0.content:
# Nova MES — Service & Infrastructure Health
SRE view of the three Nova MES services (`nova-mes-web`, `nova-batch-service`, `nova-dispensing-service`) in the `nova-mes` namespace. RED metrics from service request telemetry, custom OpenTelemetry latency histograms (`nova.*`), and log health. Nova pods are OTel-only, so resource signals come from service and journey instrumentation.

1.title: Avg Response Time (ms)
1.query:
timeseries rt = avg(dt.service.request.response_time, scalar:true), by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd svc = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter in(svc, {"nova-mes-web", "nova-batch-service", "nova-dispensing-service"})
| summarize rt = avg(rt)
| fieldsAdd `Avg Response Time (ms)` = rt / 1000.0
| fields `Avg Response Time (ms)`

2.title: Total Requests
2.query:
timeseries reqs = sum(dt.service.request.count, scalar:true), by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd svc = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter in(svc, {"nova-mes-web", "nova-batch-service", "nova-dispensing-service"})
| summarize `Total Requests` = sum(reqs)

3.title: Failure Rate %
3.query:
timeseries { fails = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count, scalar:true), reqs = sum(dt.service.request.count, scalar:true) }, by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd svc = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter in(svc, {"nova-mes-web", "nova-batch-service", "nova-dispensing-service"})
| summarize f = sum(fails), r = sum(reqs)
| fieldsAdd `Failure Rate %` = f * 100.0 / r
| fields `Failure Rate %`

4.title: Error / Warn Logs
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "nova-mes"
| filter in(loglevel, {"ERROR", "WARN"})
| summarize `Error/Warn Logs` = count()

5.title: Request Throughput by Service

6.title: Response Time by Service

7.title: Failure Rate by Service (%)
7.query:
timeseries { fails = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count), reqs = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd Service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter in(Service, {"nova-mes-web", "nova-batch-service", "nova-dispensing-service"})
| fieldsAdd `failure rate %` = fails[] * 100.0 / reqs[]
| fieldsRemove fails, reqs

8.title: Log Volume by Level

13.title: Journeys Completed vs Errors
13.query: timeseries { completed = sum(nova.journey.completed), errors = sum(nova.journey.errors) }, by:{journey}

14.title: Service Health Summary
14.query:
timeseries { rt = avg(dt.service.request.response_time, scalar:true), reqs = sum(dt.service.request.count, scalar:true), fails = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count, scalar:true) }, by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd Service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter in(Service, {"nova-mes-web", "nova-batch-service", "nova-dispensing-service"})
| fieldsAdd `Resp Time (ms)` = rt / 1000.0, Requests = reqs, `Failure %` = fails * 100.0 / reqs
| fields Service, `Resp Time (ms)`, Requests, `Failure %`
| sort Requests desc

15.title: Recent Errors & Warnings
15.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "nova-mes"
| filter in(loglevel, {"ERROR", "WARN"})
| sort timestamp desc
| fields timestamp, loglevel, service.name, content
| limit 100
